SPEC: problem_summary: "A GenAI-powered Mental Wellness Tracker to help students monitor and improve their well-being, manage stress/burnout, and address anxiety during high-stakes exams (NEET, JEE, CUET, etc.)." primary_users: "Students preparing for competitive examinations/board exams facing intense pressure." core_jobs_to_be_done: [ "Log daily mood and express feelings through open-ended journaling.", "Identify hidden stress triggers and emotional patterns from journaling.", "Obtain real-time, personalized wellness support and coping strategies grounded in validated clinical frameworks.", "Ensure safety with a robust crisis bypass system." ] mvp_scope (must-have): [ "Low-Friction Mood & Journal Entry: Emoji-based mood logging and open-ended text input.", "GenAI Trigger & Theme Extraction: Parse text to extract dominant emotions and specific prep triggers.", "Empathetic Chat Companion: Interactive chatbot grounded in WHO/MoHFW guidelines via RAG.", "Safety & Crisis Bypass: Keyword intercept that displays red warning card with Indian helpline numbers (Kiran, AASRA) and disables standard AI output.", "Analytics Dashboard: 7-day mood tracker graph and stress triggers tag cloud/frequencies." ] out_of_scope (cut for time): [ "Peer forums or community boards.", "Voice-to-text, audio analysis, or 3D avatars.", "Direct routing to human counselors or schedule coordination.", "Study planners or calendar sync tools.", "Gamified store or reward mechanisms." ] acceptance_criteria: [ "AC1: Given a student submits a journal log, when it contains specific stress triggers, then the system must save the log and extract those triggers to update the analytics dashboard.", "AC2: Given a student types a message indicating self-harm or severe crisis, when the system pre-scans it, then it must bypass the LLM, display a red card with emergency helpline numbers, and disable standard chat response.", "AC3: Given a student asks for coping strategies for exam anxiety, when the chatbot responds, then it must ground its response in WHO/MoHFW wellness frameworks and include a grounding source citation." ] risks_assumptions: [ "Assumption: LLM APIs are online and fast enough for real-time interaction.", "Risk: Accuracy of trigger extraction depends on student journal length and LLM parsing capability.", "Risk: Safety filter must maintain 100% recall of critical keywords without false negatives." ] competitive_analysis: [ { "name": "Wysa", "url": "https://www.wysa.com", "strengths": "Clinical CBT/DBT backing, complete anonymity, friendly avatar.", "weaknesses": "Can feel repetitive, paywalled core resources.", "pricing": "$74.99/year Premium, $19.99/session coaching.", "ux_patterns": "Empathy-first conversational UI, micro-interactions with emojis." }, { "name": "Replika", "url": "https://replika.com", "strengths": "Deep personalization, long-term memory, interactive avatars.", "weaknesses": "Emotional dependency risks, heavy paywalls.", "pricing": "$79.99/year Pro.", "ux_patterns": "User-editable memory logs, companion diary." }, { "name": "Woebot", "url": "https://woebothealth.com", "strengths": "Rigorous clinical validation, structured CBT sessions.", "weaknesses": "No direct-to-consumer access, rigid decision trees.", "pricing": "Enterprise B2B only.", "ux_patterns": "Structured daily check-ins, quick-reply options." }, { "name": "Youper", "url": "https://www.youper.ai", "strengths": "Validated clinical metrics (GAD-7, PHQ-9), data-driven dashboards.", "weaknesses": "No long-term free tier, rigid decision-tree chatbot.", "pricing": "$69.99/year.", "ux_patterns": "Diagnostic flow, visual progress graphs." }, { "name": "Headspace", "url": "https://www.headspace.com", "strengths": "Abstract vector illustrations, massive audio library.", "weaknesses": "UI clutter, not suitable for high-risk clinical cases.", "pricing": "$12.99/month, Student discounts.", "ux_patterns": "Streak-tracking, clean audio player." }, { "name": "Calm", "url": "https://calm.com", "strengths": "Beautiful nature UI, premium audio design.", "weaknesses": "No interactive chat, expensive paywall.", "pricing": "$69.99/year.", "ux_patterns": "Ambient landing ('Take a deep breath') with soft audio." } ] design_inspiration: [ "Anonymity by default to lower friction.", "Friendly, calm color palette with vector mascots/graphics.", "Streak tracking and clear, readable charts to showcase emotional progress.", "Empathetic chatbot with clean layout, bubbles, and instant helpline cards for crisis triggers." ]
